title: swift 40V 22cm Cordless Brushless Small Lawnmower, Lightweight and Compact, with Super-Mulching blade (Battery & Fast Charger Included)
features: [POWERFUL BATTERY]: Features a powerful 40V 2.0Ah battery providing up to 35 minutes of runtime, suitable for lawns up to 50 square meters in size.
[LIGHTWEIGHT & COMPACT]: It weighing just 5.2kg and with flexible steering wheels, is easy to use and portable.
[MULCHING FUNCTION]: Designed with a super-mulch and high-lift blade to finely chop grass clippings, enriching the soil when left on the lawn.
[VERTICAL STORAGE]: Simply push the handle forward for easy storage. It stands upright, allowing for convenient mid-work breaks.
[BRUSHLESS MOTOR]: Equipped with a brushless motor for enhanced efficiency (6000rpm), quieter operation, reduced maintenance, and extended lifespan.
[3 CUTTING HEIGHTS]: Choose from 3 cutting heights between 30mm and 50mm, adjustable with a single lever for easy adaptation to grass conditions.
description: Product Description EASY TO CUT Specialised blades, performing multiple cutting passes at 6000rpm, ensure a perfect cutting result. EASY TO ASSEMBLE Simply connect the aluminium tubes to complete assembly. EASY TO ADJUST A single lever makes it easy to raise the blades from 30mm to 50mm. EASY TO CARRY This machine weighs only 5.2 kg, making it very convenient for elderly users and female users to operate and transport. EASY TO STORE Allows for upright storage, enabling you to take breaks from work whenever needed. POWER SHARE This swift battery can be used with multiple products. That means one battery can power swift tools.
